labeling_disposition: The 813-912 numbers are preserved historical provider-iteration labels. They are not canonical TSP loops unless restored source proves an individual parsed rulebook semantic change.
claim_boundary: provider-local warm in-process timing is not a cross-machine benchmark
integer SEC cutting plane is established branch-and-cut machinery, not a novel TSP algorithm
exact results through kroA100 do not imply state-of-the-art performance or polynomial scaling
semantic neighborhood cuts are valid SEC seeds; observed speedup is empirical, not universal
zero reported semantic growth is provider-local evidence until the physical archive is restored and each rulebook delta is audited
historical iteration labels 813-912 are reserved but not canonical loop identifiers
